title: Evaluation of SARS-CoV-2 vaccination in pregnant and breastfeeding women.
ehr_evidence: None; data were collected via an online questionnaire.
summary: Safety evaluation of SARS-CoV-2 vaccination in pregnant and breastfeeding women.
key_findings: Breastfeeding women experienced higher rates of adverse events (AEs) compared to pregnant women.
93.1% of pregnancies were carried to term.
No pattern of serious AEs emerged.
